title: cyperus erectus var. erectus
intro: Cyperus erectus var. erectus, also known as purple papyrus or umbrella papyrus, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic to help alleviate water retention. In herbal preparations, Cyperus erectus var. erectus can be used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder to harness its medicinal properties.
